name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for HisWord
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Track
- [ ] Backend (Laravel)
- [ ] Mobile (Android/iOS/Desktop)
- [ ] Web

## Engine Scope
- [ ] YES2/Bintex only
- [ ] SWORD only
- [ ] Both engines
- [ ] Engine-agnostic

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Reference
Is this feature present in any reference app (AndBible, PocketSword, Logos, YouVersion)?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or links here.
